description: Fetch all conversation comments + reviews + inline review threads for the open PR on the current branch via `gh api graphql` (read-only, paginated).
rules: read-only — only `gh pr view` + `gh api graphql` queries, never mutates the PR or repo
resolves the PR from the current branch of REPO_DIR (works for cross-repo PRs via head repo owner/name)
pages through comments, reviews, and reviewThreads until all cursors are exhausted
merged result written to record_store as pr_comments.json
requires an authenticated gh CLI and a branch with an open PR; degrades to {} when gh is absent/unauthenticated
usage: Set REPO_DIR (the git repo dir whose current branch has the open PR). Output: pr_comments.json.
limitation: Needs live GitHub access through an authenticated `gh` CLI and an open PR on the current branch; offline or without `gh` it produces an empty {} artifact.
